title: Nursing Facilities * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Nursing Facilities * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT OUR HOUSE OUR HOUSE RESIDENTIAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential care facility for people living with HIV with a capacity of 14 individuals. Residents receive nursing, occupational therapy, and social work support. Some residents regain their health and become independent enough to be discharged. Others remain for continued intensive services, maintenance services, or palliative care. 2727 SE Alder Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: -Individuals with an HIV diagnosis -No evidence of communicable Tuberculosis -Eligible for Medicaid or have private insurance that covers needed services -A way to pay for room and board -Meet income restrictions of 185% of federal poverty level guidelines -A need for 24-hour nursing care, shown by any of the following: -Repeated hospitalizations or ER visits within the past 3 months -Inability to manage complex medication regime -Change of condition resulting in new or deteriorating activities of daily living (ADL) deficits -Complex care plan due to unstable conditions or symptoms -Uncontrolled pain or other symptoms such as fatigue or nausea -Unexplained weight loss or gain -Severe dementia or behavioral issues that contribute to decreased management of any of the above issues Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 234-0175 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT OUR HOUSE RESIDENTIAL CARE
